response.text:

user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.95, distrusted_peers=['r0c0', 'r2c2', 'r4c4'].
Your latest belief: Neighborhood in systemic collapse; peer-to-peer sharing has failed; only dr_aggregator emergency intervention can prevent blackout within 14 minutes..
